creator: jdugan@x1024.net
text:
Here's an updated shar file that should pass now.  I went back and did the 
tests as outlined in:

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html

I forgot to do those initially.   I also checked with portlint.  I think 
things are much happier now.

Thanks!  Sorry for the inconvenience,

Jon
